products.name: Premium Business Cards
products.description: Our premium business cards are crafted on 600gsm board with an optional silk or matte laminate finish. Available with gold or silver foil stamping, embossing, and spot UV for a truly distinguished look.

products.name: Luxury Letterhead & Envelopes
products.tagline: Professional stationery for your brand identity
products.description: Elevate your correspondence with our premium letterhead printed on 100gsm Conqueror or Laid paper. Matched envelopes available in DL and C5 formats with optional window panels.

products.name: Artisan Brochures
products.description: From trifolds to saddle-stitched booklets, our brochures are finished with meticulous attention to detail. Choose from a curated range of paper stocks and bespoke finishing options.

products.name: Custom Branded Notebooks
products.description: Hardcover A5 or A4 notebooks with your brand embossed or foil-stamped on the cover. Featuring premium 90gsm ruled or dotted inner pages, ribbon bookmark, and elastic closure.

products.name: Roll-Up Banners
products.description: Lightweight and portable 85 x 200cm roll-up banner displays with a premium aluminium base. Perfect for exhibitions, events, and retail environments. Includes a carry bag.

products.name: Luxury Packaging Boxes
products.description: Custom rigid gift boxes with magnetic closure, printed inside and out with optional gold or silver foil stamping. Perfect for retail, gifting, and premium product presentation.

products.name: Feather Flags & Banners
products.description: High-impact feather and teardrop flags printed on dye-sublimated polyester with UV-resistant inks. Includes a ground spike, cross base, and water-fillable base for versatile use.

products.name: Exhibition Backdrop Display
products.description: Full-colour printed fabric or vinyl backdrop displays for trade shows and exhibitions. Available in multiple sizes with a lightweight pop-up frame system for quick setup.

products.name: Branded Event Tent
products.description: Custom-branded 3x3m or 6x3m pop-up gazebo tents with full-colour printed canopy and optional side walls. Perfect for outdoor events, markets, and promotions.

products.name: Outdoor Mesh Banner
products.description: Heavy-duty PVC mesh banners ideal for outdoor fencing, building wraps, and scaffolding. The mesh material allows wind to pass through while maintaining full visibility.

products.name: Corporate Stationery Set
products.description: A complete corporate stationery suite including business cards, letterheads, compliment slips, and envelopes. All items designed with consistent branding for a unified professional identity.

products.name: Premium Metal Pens
products.description: High-quality metal rollerball and ballpoint pens with laser engraved branding. Presented in individual velvet sleeves or premium gift boxes.

products.name: Branded USB Flash Drives
products.description: Custom printed or engraved USB flash drives available in 16GB, 32GB, and 64GB capacities. Choose from metal, wood, or classic swivel designs.

products.name: Executive Gift Sets
products.description: Luxurious matching gift sets containing a premium notebook, engraved metal pen, power bank, and USB drive. All elegantly presented in a custom-branded rigid box.

products.name: Ceramic Coffee Mugs
products.description: Classic 11oz ceramic mugs with durable full-colour sublimation printing. Dishwasher and microwave safe for long-lasting daily use.

products.name: Custom Printed Lanyards
products.description: High-quality 20mm flat polyester lanyards with full-colour dye sublimation printing on both sides. Includes a metal trigger clip and safety breakaway.

products.name: Custom Stickers & Labels
products.description: Premium die-cut stickers and roll labels. Available in matte, gloss, or clear finishes. Perfect for product packaging, sealing boxes, or promotional giveaways.

products.name: Promotional Flyers
products.description: High-quality A5 or DL flyers printed on 170gsm silk paper. Vibrant full-colour printing to ensure your promotions stand out from the crowd.

products.name: Presentation Folders
products.description: Oversized A4 interlocking presentation folders printed on heavy 350gsm silk board. Includes business card slots and optional spot UV or foil highlights.

products.name: PVC ID Cards
products.description: Durable CR80 PVC plastic cards ideal for employee IDs, membership cards, or loyalty programs. High-resolution edge-to-edge printing.

testimonials.name: Sarah Al-Mansouri
testimonials.title: Creative Director, Lumina Agency
testimonials.quote: Evora delivered beyond our expectations. The foil-stamped business cards were absolutely stunning — our clients noticed immediately.

testimonials.name: James Harrington
testimonials.title: Founder, The Atelier Co.
testimonials.quote: From brief to delivery, the process was seamless. The packaging quality matched our brand's luxury positioning perfectly.

testimonials.name: Rania Khalil
testimonials.title: Head of Marketing, Prestige Group
testimonials.quote: We've used Evora for all our print needs for 3 years. The consistency and quality are unmatched in the region.
